title: Stage images should be empty — just light, space, and perspective
body: First try for the Artist studio, I used a detailed photo of an actual artist studio — plants, string lights, curtains. MJ faithfully reproduced all that clutter. The lesson: the scene image is not a scene description, it is a stage. Light, space, perspective. That is it. Props come in later runs through text.
decision: MJ stage images must be nearly empty — just light, space, and perspective.
alternatives_considered: Using detailed reference photos of the full scene.
